zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford於1540年8月25日出生在英國時，她的父親Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk23歲，母親Lady Frances Brandon23歲。她於1553年5月25日與Sir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembroke結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1568年1月26日在英國素福爾可巴貝享年27歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里 聖 馬丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford于1540年8月25日出生在英国时，她的父亲Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk23岁，母亲Lady Frances Brandon23岁。她于1553年5月25日与Sir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembroke结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1568年1月26日在英国素福爾可巴貝享年27岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里 聖 馬丁。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford was born on 25 August 1540, in England, her father, Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk, was 23 and her mother, Lady Frances Brandon, was 23. She married Sir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembroke on 25 May 1553. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 26 January 1568, in Babergh, Suffolk, England, at the age of 27, and was buried in Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, England.

fr.Tower of London, Middlesex, England: Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford est née le 25 août 1540, à Angleterre, son père, Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Frances Brandon, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembroke le 25 mai 1553. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 janvier 1568, à Babergh, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.Tower of London, Middlesex, England: Tower of London, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford am 25. August 1540 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk 23 und ihre Mutter Lady Frances Brandon 23. Sie hat am 25. Mai 1553 Sir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembroke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Januar 1568 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Babergh, Suffolk, England und wurde in Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford è nata il il 25 agosto 1540 nel England, sua padre, Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Lady Frances Brandon, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembroke il 25 maggio 1553. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 26 gennaio 1568, nel Babergh, Suffolk, England, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertfordが1540年8月25日にイギリスで生まれた時，父Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolkは23歳，母Lady Frances Brandonは23歳であった。1553年5月25日にSir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembrokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1568年1月26日にイギリススフォルクババーグで27歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー スト マルティンにて埋葬された。

ko.Tower of London, Middlesex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 타워 프 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford(이)가 1540년 8월 25일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Frances Brandon(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1553년 5월 25일 Sir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembroke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1568년 1월 26일 영국 수폴크 베이버그에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이 스트 마틴에 묻혔다.

pt.25 August 1540–26 January 1568: 25 de agosto de 1540–26 de janeiro de 1568
pt.Tower of London, Middlesex, England: Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford nasceu em 25 de agosto de 1540, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Frances Brandon, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembroke em 25 de maio de 1553. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1568, em Babergh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Tower of London, Middlesex, England: тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Grey Countess Of Hertford родилась 25 августа 1540 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Frances Brandon, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembroke 25 мая 1553 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 января 1568 г. в местности бабирг, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности салисбури ст мартинь, уилцхир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Henry Herbert 2nd Earl of Pembroke el 25 de mayo de 1553. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
